name: Lemon and Garlic Roasted Beets
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beets, peeled and sliced 1/4 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In an 8-inch square non-reactive baking dish, toss all ingredients together.
3. Spray a piece of parchment paper with cooking spray and set the oiled side down on the baking dish.
4. Cover tightly with foil and roast for approximately 40 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally.
